## Executive Summary

The portfolio remained resilient across the quarter with stable variance and lower-than-expected downside movement.

## Findings

Operational throughput improved while exception rates declined in the highest-volume segments.

## Action Plan

- Phase 1
  - Validate data contracts
    - Add smoke checks
- Phase 2
  - Run full regression

| Year | Revenue | Margin | Notes |
| --- | ---: | ---: | --- |
| 2022 | 1200000 | 18.4% | Baseline period |
| 2023 | 1385000 | 20.1% | Efficiency gains |
| 2024 | 1499000 | 21.0% | Scaled operations |
